sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23343" key="dallw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαλλώ</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαλώ</orth>, <sense id="n23343.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">old woman</tr_> (cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δαλός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαλμᾶναι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰκάσαι,</foreign> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
